MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
No appearance by the moving party.
Attorney Stella K. Park appears by Court Call for Plaintiff Jeeun Kim the opposing party.

The plaintiff did not comply with the tentative rules of notifying the otherside of their appearance. The Court cannot hear argument from the Plaintiff.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant's Motion to Strike Complaint is GRANTED. Request for Attorney's fees is stricken. No opposition filed. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (501)

Deft Jon Willard'S Motion To Strike Plaintiff'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Off Calendar

Defendant'S Jon Willard'S Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-01-2017 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jun-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
No appearance by the moving party.
Attorney Stella K. Park appears by Court Call for Plaintiff Jeeun Kim the opposing party.

The plaintiff did not comply with the tentative rules of notifying the otherside of their appearance. The Court cannot hear argument from the Plaintiff.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JON WILLARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to (1) attach the missing exhibit; (2) to allege facts in good faith to support all elements of breach of oral contract in light of the Statute of Frauds and Secrest v. Security Nat. Mortg. Loan Trust 2002-2 (2008) 167 Cal.App.4th 544; (3) to allege facts in good faith to support all elements of promissory fraud; (4) to re-plead unjust enrichment as remedy. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk J. Rumsey, Not Recorded. (501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-26-2017 Continued To Jun-06-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT JON WILLARD's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT - The motion is transferred to be heard in Department 501, at 9:30 a.m., on June 6, 2017. That department handles all real property related matters. Please calendar all future law and motion matters in that department. Discovery matters shall be calendared on the discovery calendar, which is heard in Room 301. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =(302/HK)
